governance_comment: Critical-modules list is GOVERNED in docs/03-testing-strategy.md §11 — adding a module is an ADR, removing requires a retrospective.
break_comment: repository.ts also has outbox/payment paths covered only by the Testcontainers consumer specs (excluded from the fast Stryker suite), so those mutants are NoCoverage here. break is a floor over the gate+idempotency baseline.
